response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video content. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists entirely of conversational dialogue between two VTubers. 3. No vocal music was detected at any point in the video.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a conversation between two VTubers who are in the process of cooking a meal. There is no vocal music throughout the clip.

scenes.description: Two VTubers are engaged in a casual conversation while cooking curry. The screen shows the cooking process. No vocal music is playing.
